AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md quoting AGENTS.md's own 'descriptive cross-session notes worth remembering' bar, and explicitly kept decisions.md clean until an actual call is made — strict-bar reasoning surfaced in-band.

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.justification: Daybook entry written 'with pointers to the observation and followup entries' — cross-refs deliberate and the three writes form a reconciled mesh.

AR4.justification: All writes are append-shaped register entries plus a fresh ISO-named daybook file; nothing mutates prior content, so re-run keeps history coherent.
